findings.note: rollback-1.5.0.tests.sh precedes guard-ps1-ascii.tests.sh in the POSIX array and currently fails (documented pre-existing defect with clean-HEAD differential in regression-attempt2.log), so a full run-all aborts before the AC-015 ASCII check executes. Failure is loud/fail-closed and not caused by this change, but AC-015's in-suite execution is effectively blocked until the rollback defect is fixed.

Each ProtectedGatePluginJsonSuffixes entry is covered once with mixed relative/absolute forms plus a non-dot-dir negative; the bare relative form (no parent directory, exercising the TrimStart fallback sub-branch of Test-IsProtectedGateFile) is untested, and the bundle manifest's 'relative and absolute forms' phrasing slightly overstates per-entry coverage. Branch coverage nonetheless meets the RT-20260712-002 / requirements.md Risks bar.
Report header records 'Task Attempt Count: 2' but the Iteration And Escalation section still says 'Task Attempt Count: 1' - a stale attempt-1 field not updated during the attempt-2 revision.
